title: How Going First Turns a Man Into Someone Worth Following
caption:
Nobody follows the man giving orders from the back.

The godly kind of leader takes the worst job first, apologizes first, shows up before he's asked, and pays the cost quietly. Christ didn't send anyone in front of Him to the cross. He went first.

You don't earn trust with a title. You earn it with what you volunteer for when no one's counting.

#faith #leadership #christianman #servanthood #manofgod
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
